issues.description: Action type 'AttachDon' is incorrect. The effect gives rested DON!! cards (already rested), not attaches new Don. Should use 'GiveDon' with a rested/duration qualifier, or clarify the mechanic. Current DSL implies attaching fresh Don, but text specifies 'rested DON!!' cards being given from hand/pool.
Count should reflect 'up to 2', but the action lacks conditional/optional semantics. DSL should support optional count (e.g., 'upTo':true or similar) or this needs restructuring.

Target 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' is too broad. Text specifies 'your Leader OR 1 of your Characters' (singular character, not multiple). Target should clarify: single character selection or leader only.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Give up to 2 rested DON!! cards to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.
